coreJobStatement: Fabricate welded galvanized structural steel products for equestrian use (Heuraufe, Paddockbox) from raw steel through certified welding and outsourced surface treatment to finished product
hierarchy: Manufacturing Process VN (L6 steps) — 14-step in-house + outsourced fabrication chain for Böhmer equestrian products
marketSize: Internal production process — NAICS 333111 Farm Machinery & Equipment Manufacturing

l6Systems.name: Design & Engineering
l6Systems.jobFamily: Translate product requirements into manufacturing-ready drawings, BOM, and weld procedure specifications
l6Systems.scope: CAD/DXF flat patterns, tube cutting lists, WPS per ISO 3834-2, CE technical file (Paddockbox)

l6Systems.name: Material Procurement & Receiving
l6Systems.jobFamily: Source and verify incoming steel tube, sheet, and hardware at target cost, quality grade, and lead time
l6Systems.scope: S235JR / S355 SHS/RHS tube, flat sheet, corrugated roofing sheet, bolts, castors, hay nets

l6Systems.name: Cutting & Forming
l6Systems.jobFamily: Cut flat sheet and tube stock to required profiles and lengths; form bends and radii
l6Systems.scope: Laser cutting (DXF nested), tube cutting (band saw), CNC press brake bending

l6Systems.name: Welding & Assembly
l6Systems.jobFamily: Join cut and bent components into certified structural assemblies per WPS
l6Systems.scope: MIG/MAG welding (DIN EN ISO 3834-2), TIG for visible joints, welding jigs, tack + full weld sequence

l6Systems.name: Grinding & Deburring
l6Systems.jobFamily: Remove weld spatter, grind flush welds in horse-contact zones, deburr all edges
l6Systems.scope: Angle grinders, flap discs, pneumatic die grinders — no sharp points in horse-contact areas

l6Systems.name: Surface Treatment (Outsourced)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Apply corrosion protection for ISO 12944 C3+ 15-year outdoor service life in equestrian environment
l6Systems.scope: Hot-dip galvanizing ISO 1461 (45–70 µm zinc) + optional powder topcoat; outsourced to Verzinkerei

l6Systems.name: Quality Control & Final Assembly
l6Systems.jobFamily: Verify dimensional accuracy, weld quality, coating integrity; install non-welded hardware
l6Systems.scope: DIN EN 1090 first-article inspection; coating thickness gauge; functional check (hinges, castors, brakes)

l6Systems.name: Packaging, Storage & Delivery
l6Systems.jobFamily: Protect, store, and ship finished products to DACH customers
l6Systems.scope: Stretch wrap, foam interleaving, pallet strapping; finished goods storage; external freight (LTL/FTL)

vnUnits.name: Product CAD Modeling
vnUnits.functionalJob: Create 3D CAD model (SolidWorks/Inventor) with DXF flat-pattern export for laser and tube cutting lists. Revision-controlled per DIN EN 1090.
vnUnits.description: One-time per SKU; same effort regardless of batch size. Böhmer CAD engineer owns this step.

vnUnits.name: Weld Procedure Specification (WPS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Document and qualify weld procedures per DIN EN ISO 3834-2. Paddockbox hinge joints require fatigue-rated WPS — primary constraint C1.
vnUnits.description: Fixed cost per product. Critical for DIN EN 1090 certification and Paddockbox CE marking. BÖHMER PRIMARY

vnUnits.name: CE Technical File (Paddockbox)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Compile CE technical file per GPSR for Paddockbox — risk assessment, product declaration, test evidence. Outsourced to CE consultant.
vnUnits.description: Fixed per product. Required before DACH market launch. Heuraufe requires only GPSR product marking.

vnUnits.name: Steel Tube & Sheet Ordering
vnUnits.functionalJob: Order S235JR/S355 SHS/RHS tube, flat sheet, corrugated roofing sheet from steel service center. Typical lead time 1–3 weeks domestic.
vnUnits.description: Sub-linear scaling — bulk purchasing yields volume discounts. Böhmer currently JIT; OEM transition requires push-inventory model.

vnUnits.name: Purchased Parts Procurement (Castors, Hardware)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Source heavy-duty swivel castors (≥400 kg, 200 mm dia., foot brake), bolts, nuts, hay nets, gate latches, CE plates from specialist suppliers.
vnUnits.description: Fixed at low volumes. Castor quality is critical — outdoor mud/gravel rating required. BÖHMER PRIMARY

vnUnits.name: Incoming Inspection & Storage
vnUnits.functionalJob: Unload steel bundles, verify heat/lot vs. EN 10204 3.1 mill certificate, dimensional spot-check, assign storage location.
vnUnits.description: Linear scaling — receiving hours scale with delivery frequency. Existing overhead crane and racking infrastructure.

vnUnits.name: Laser / Plasma Cutting (Flat Sheet)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Cut flat sheet steel into 2D profiles (base plates, gussets, roof panels, connector plates) per DXF nesting layout. Material: 2–8 mm S235JR/S355.
vnUnits.description: Step-function capacity: 1 operator per machine; 2nd machine only when utilization >85%. Sub-linear on material efficiency (nesting). BÖHMER PRIMARY

vnUnits.name: Tube Cutting & Preparation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Cut steel tube stock to specified lengths per cutting list. Tube sizes: 80×80×5, 60×60×4, 40×40×3 SHS/RHS. Band saw or tube laser.
vnUnits.description: Linear scaling — each cut takes same time. Band saw capacity ~80–120 cuts/shift.

vnUnits.name: Bending / Forming
vnUnits.functionalJob: Form steel tube and sheet into required angles and radii per drawing. CNC press brake for sheet bending. Minimal bending required for Heuraufe; some tube bends for Paddockbox hinge brackets.
vnUnits.description: Step-function capacity. Sub-linear for repeat batches (CNC program recall). One press brake handles both products.

vnUnits.name: Fixture Sub-Assembly & Tack Welding
vnUnits.functionalJob: Clamp components in welding jig, tack weld to hold dimensional position before full weld sequence. Jig is fixed investment per SKU.
vnUnits.description: Fixed jig investment amortized over production volume. Jigs must be designed and built per product — new capability required.

vnUnits.name: Full Weld Sequence (MIG/MAG)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Execute full weld sequence per WPS using MIG/MAG (Ar/CO2 82/18, 1.0–1.2 mm wire). Heuraufe: ~6–10 hrs/unit [EST]. Paddockbox segment: ~3–5 hrs/segment [EST].
vnUnits.description: Linear scaling — primary labor bottleneck. Certified welder constraint (DIN EN ISO 9606-1). BÖHMER PRIMARY

vnUnits.name: Paddockbox Hinge Joint Welding (Fatigue-Rated)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Weld Paddockbox fold-flat hinge joints to fatigue-rated WPS. Full-penetration or minimum-throat fillet welds. 10,000-cycle test mandatory per constraint C1.
vnUnits.description: Critical quality gate for Paddockbox. Requires dedicated WPS qualification. Higher welder skill level required vs. standard structural welds. BÖHMER PRIMARY

vnUnits.name: Weld Spatter Removal & Flush Grinding
vnUnits.functionalJob: Grind all weld seams in horse-contact zones flush (no proud beads). Heuraufe bar-grid and all edges that horses can contact. ~2–3 hrs/unit [EST].
vnUnits.description: Linear scaling — manual process, no batch efficiency. Critical for animal welfare compliance.

vnUnits.name: Edge Deburring & Sharp-Point Elimination
vnUnits.functionalJob: Deburr all laser-cut and saw-cut edges. Verify no sharp points with glove test. Paddockbox segment: ~1–2 hrs/segment [EST].
vnUnits.description: Linear scaling. Angle grinders, flap discs, pneumatic die grinders. Existing equipment.

vnUnits.name: Transport to External Galvanizer
vnUnits.functionalJob: Arrange pickup with freight carrier. Transport welded assemblies to external hot-dip galvanizer (Verzinkerei in Laupheim/Ulm region). Mask Paddockbox castor socket threads before transport.
vnUnits.description: Sub-linear — 1 truck trip serves 5–20 units. Outsourced step; Böhmer has no in-house galvanizing. BÖHMER PRIMARY

vnUnits.name: Hot-Dip Galvanizing (External)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Hot-dip galvanize per ISO 1461 at external Verzinkerei. Minimum 45 µm zinc layer (≥70 µm for heavy sections). Lead time: 1–2 weeks per batch [EST].
vnUnits.description: Outsourced. Priced per kg with batch minimums — sub-linear with larger batches. No in-house capital required.

vnUnits.name: Powder Topcoat (Optional, External)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Apply polyester powder coat (RAL color, 60–80 µm) over galvanized surface for UV and urine acid resistance. Color TBD by Böhmer product marketing.
vnUnits.description: Optional additional service at galvanizer or specialist powder coater. Adds 1–3 days lead time and ~EUR 8–15/unit.

vnUnits.name: Dimensional & Weld Visual Inspection
vnUnits.functionalJob: Check critical dimensions per drawing ±tolerance. Visual weld inspection per ISO 5817 level C minimum. First-article inspection 100% on first 5 units per DIN EN 1090.
vnUnits.description: Sub-linear — FAI is fixed; ongoing QC shifts 100%→20% statistical sampling as process matures. BÖHMER PRIMARY

vnUnits.name: Coating Thickness & Quality Verification
vnUnits.functionalJob: Measure coating thickness (6+ points per unit) with Elcometer gauge. Verify no bare spots or adhesion failures.
vnUnits.description: Sub-linear. Fixed tool investment (coating gauge already owned). Applied to returned assemblies from galvanizer.

vnUnits.name: Final Assembly & Hardware Installation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Install non-welded components: heavy-duty castors, hinge pins, latch hardware, hay nets/bar grids, CE marking plates, Böhmer branding labels. Heuraufe: ~1–2 hrs/unit [EST].
vnUnits.description: Linear scaling — same per unit. Pre-kitted hardware sets reduce fitter time slightly. BÖHMER PRIMARY

vnUnits.name: Packaging & Protection
vnUnits.functionalJob: Wrap fork pockets with foam, strap to pallet, shrink-wrap hardware bags. Paddockbox: interleave segments with foam/cardboard, strap to pallet. Label with order and delivery address.
vnUnits.description: Linear scaling. Consumables only (stretch wrap, foam, strapping). No capital equipment.

vnUnits.name: Finished Goods Storage
vnUnits.functionalJob: Store finished units in covered area until dispatch. New capability: Böhmer currently has zero finished-goods inventory (JIT contract model). OEM buffer stock required.
vnUnits.description: Step-function: existing warehouse space sufficient for <50 units; dedicated area required beyond that. Critical operational gap for OEM launch.

vnUnits.name: DACH Freight & Delivery
vnUnits.functionalJob: Dispatch to customer (Reitstall, dealer, end user) within DACH region. Heuraufe: single unit per standard flatbed. Paddockbox: 4–6 segments per truck [EST].
vnUnits.description: Sub-linear — per-unit transport cost decreases with shipment consolidation. External freight carrier; Böhmer has no owned transport fleet.

böhmerPosition: Böhmer Systemtechnik GmbH operates all in-house steps (L6.1–L6.5, L6.7–L6.8) and coordinates outsourced surface treatment (L6.6). Primary bottlenecks: welding labor (L5.4.2, linear), laser cutting capacity (L5.3.1, step-function), and finished-goods storage (L5.8.2, new capability required).
